name: Caribbean Jerk Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Good Seasons Italian Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix all ingredients except the chicken.
2. Pour the dressing over the chicken and cover. Refrigerate for 1 hour to marinate.
3. Drain the chicken; discard the dressing mixture.
4. Place the chicken on a greased grill over hot coals or on a rack of broiler pan 5-7 inches from heat.
5. Grill or broil the chicken for 40-45 minutes, turning frequently, until cooked through.
Prep Time: 10 minutes plus marinating. Grilling or broiling time: 45 minutes.
